summary: Critical: Actions not pinned to SHA (security violation) — `actions/checkout@v4` and `oven-sh/setup-bun@v1` need full commit SHAs. Workflow does not run `bun test` as required by task; no test execution in pipeline. Manual XML parsing in parser.ts (lines 15-94) is verbose and fragile; getAttr regex wordbound logic fragile with special chars. Workflow lacks test harness structure for multi-fixture validation via act. Missing `set -euo pipefail` in shell steps. actionlint step doesn't fail on error. Good module separation but implementation gaps critical to task requirements.
